name: Triggerborn Era RPG
description:
Welcome to The Triggerborn Era — a modern world twisted by supernatural evolution, trauma-driven power, and the monsters humans become.

In this world, people are sometimes born with faint, hidden birthmarks that reveal their destiny:

they are Triggerborn, individuals whose abilities awaken only through specific emotional or situational “triggers.” Each Triggerborn is tied to a Target Type — the thing they are “meant” to fight.

Defeat your Target Type → your powers evolve.

The more dangerous the opponent, the larger the evolution spike.

This system shapes everything:

heroes, villains, serial killers, vigilantes, government operatives, urban legends — all born from what they fight.

Evolution isn’t logical.

Someone who hunts spiders may gain night vision or agility.

Someone who defeats liars might evolve emotion detection or mental pressure.

Someone who kills fire-users may eventually control plasma.

Powers are symbolic, personal, and unpredictable.

---

🌍 THE WORLD ITSELF

You are entering a version of modern Earth where:

Triggerborn are tracked by international agencies

serial killers evolve into urban legends

vigilantes become superhuman

specialized prisons are built to counter supernatural powers

evolution creates gods from trauma

and normal people try to survive in an era where violence literally makes you stronger

The international group NEXUS Authority regulates Triggerborn, maintains peace, and hunts those who use powers to kill uncontrolled.

The Crimson Registry catalogs every Triggerborn’s mark, evolution level, psychological danger score, and kill count.

Every nation fears Triggerborn — and relies on them.

---

⚡ THE TRIGGERBORN POWER SYSTEM

Birthmark → Trigger → Activation → Evolution

Every Triggerborn’s power awakens when their specific trigger is met.

Triggers include:

emotions (fear, pain, loneliness)
